actionItems.title: System Administrator Profile Detected
actionItems.action: Audit admin profile assignments. Create custom profiles with least-privilege access and reassign users.

actionItems.title: 5 Profiles Have Broad Data Permissions
actionItems.action: Restrict broad permissions to only system integration profiles. Use permission sets for exceptions.

actionItems.title: 2 Permission Set(s) Grant ModifyAllData
actionItems.action: Remove ModifyAllData from permission sets unless strictly required for integration users.

actionItems.title: 10 Active Flows Lack Fault Handling
actionItems.action: Add Fault connector paths to all Screen and Autolaunched Flows. Log errors to a custom object for visibility.

actionItems.title: Automation Conflicts on 1 Object(s)
actionItems.action: Consolidate automation into a single Record-Triggered Flow per object. Retire redundant flows.

actionItems.title: 34 Apex Triggers — High Volume
actionItems.action: Consider a Trigger Framework (one trigger per object, handler pattern) to centralise trigger logic.
